samples.gvd:
module pulse_detect(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input data_in,
    output data_out
);
endmodule
samples.xml_description: Implement a module for pulse detection. Clock signal. Reset signal (active low). One-bit input signal. Output signal indicating the presence of pulses. Initial state of the pulse detection process. State indicating that a pulse is detected. State indicating that a pulse is detected. State indicating the end of a pulse. Declare a register state to keep track of the current state of the pulse detection process. Initialize state to S0. state = S0; State register is updated on the positive edge of the clk signal. always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) Reset state register on the negative edge of the rst_n signal. if (~rst_n) Reset the state register to S0 and set data_out to 0. state <= S0; data_out <= 0; State S0: Initial state of the pulse detection process. else if (state == S0) Transition to S1 when data_in is 1. if (data_in) state <= S1; State S1: State indicating that a pulse is detected. else if (state == S1) Transition to S2 when data_in is 1. if (data_in) state <= S2; Transition to S0 when data_in is 0. else state <= S0; State S2: State indicating that a pulse is detected. else if (state == S2) Transition to S3 when data_in is 0. if (~data_in) state <= S3; Transition to S0 when data_in is 1. else state <= S0; State S3: State indicating the end of a pulse. else if (state == S3) Transition to S0 when data_in is 1. if (data_in) state <= S0; Transition to S0 when data_in is 0. else state <= S0; Declare a wire data_out to output the result of the pulse detection process. always @(*) Set data_out to 1 when the state register is S3. if (state == S3) data_out = 1; Set data_out to 0 for all other states. else data_out = 0; Declare a register state to keep track of the current state of the pulse detection process. State register is updated on the positive edge of the clk signal. Reset state register on the negative edge of the rst_n signal. Initialize state to S0 on reset. Set data_out to 0 on reset. Transition to S1 when data_in is 1. Transition to S2 when data_in is 1. Transition to S0 when data_in is 0. Transition to S3 when data_in is 0. Transition to S0 when data_in is 1. Transition to S0 when data_in is 0. Set data_out to 1 when the state register is S3. Set data_out to 0 for all other states.
